description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical body made of orange plastic and two wide white bands encircling its upper and middle sections. The surface shows visible signs of wear, including dirt, scuff marks, and some fading, indicating it has been used outdoors. The tip of the cone is slightly rounded and solid, tapering smoothly to a point. The base is a thick, black, hexagonal platform that appears weighted and textured for stability, with a slightly raised edge and visible wear along the perimeter. The cone's body is hollow, allowing it to be stackable or easily transported. No logos or text are visible, and the overall condition suggests it is functional but well-used.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with two white bands and a thick, black hexagonal base, showing dirt and scuff marks from outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white bands and a scuffed, dirty surface; the black hexagonal base is clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the cone's left side, with more visible dirt and wear on the white bands and base.
description_view_2: Another angled view showing the right side, with similar wear patterns and the base's thickness and texture apparent.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing scuff marks on the lower orange section and additional wear on the base's edge.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide white reflective stripes encircle the cone, one near the top and one at mid-height; both are of similar width and contrast with the orange body.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is solid, slightly rounded, and orange, with no attachments or holes.
attribute_base_design: The base is thick, black, and hexagonal, made of heavy rubber for stability, with a raised edge and visible scuff marks.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the cone.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks, fading, and accumulated grime, but structurally intact.
